notification.levelLocked: [YourEx] This level is locked in User Mode. Switch to Developer Mode to bypass locks.
notification.devDisabled: [YourEx] Developer Mode is disabled by configuration.
feedback.systemError: [System Error] Assist system output invalid. Refine your instructions.
reward.chapterPreview.2: >> Signals are back — stronger. rEx is testing you.
reward.chapterPreview.3: >> rEx signals have evolved — it's starting to speak to you.
reward.chapterPreview.4: >> Time to send an SOS. Meridian-7 fuel at 0.8%.
reward.chapterPreview.5: >> …a response has arrived. rEx received your message.
notification.hiddenChapterUnlocked: 🌙 [Incoming Signal…] rEx is responding to you. Hidden chapter unlocked.
certificate.title: YOUREX · JOURNEY CERTIFICATE
certificate.summary: has successfully decoded all rEx signals, parsed {total} protocol frames, and ascended from Signal Contact to certified rEx Parser.
certificate.notUnlocked: [YourEx] Complete the rEx final transmission (Ch5) to unlock the journey certificate.
reset.confirmDetail: This will permanently erase all level records, XP, achievements, certificate state, and the saved player name. This cannot be undone.
reset.successNotification: [YourEx] Game progress reset. Ready for a new journey?
reset.sidebarTooltip: Erase all local game data and start over
tutorial.waitForExecute: Click the Execute button to continue.
tutorial.sidebarBlocked: [YourEx] Finish or skip the tutorial first.
tutorial.restartDevOnly: [YourEx] Restart Tutorial is only available in Developer Mode.
tutorial.fillPrompt.level_01: Match every line that contains the lowercase word "hello"
tutorial.step.story.title: Signal Archive
tutorial.step.story.body: Every signal carries an ID, chapter and difficulty up here, plus a short story below — the story usually hides clues.
tutorial.step.mission.title: Mission & Test Data
tutorial.step.mission.body: This line tells the AI what regex to build. Below are the samples your regex will be scored on — cleared items get a ✓ after submission.
tutorial.step.promptInput.title: Prompt Input
tutorial.step.promptInput.body:
Tell the AI what to match in plain language. Example:
`Match every line that contains the lowercase word "hello"`
Use the button below to auto-fill it.
tutorial.step.promptInput.unavailableBod: No GitHub Copilot model is reachable right now (not signed in / quota / missing extension). The prompt path is disabled — we'll skip ahead to the regex flow.
tutorial.step.helpers.title: Helper Tools
tutorial.step.helpers.body: The 👁 Scan Eye unlocks hints after failures. Or skip the AI and write a regex directly below — only one input slot at a time.
tutorial.step.execute.title: Execute
tutorial.step.execute.body: **Press the Execute button to actually submit your prompt.**
tutorial.step.execute.unavailableBody: Nothing to submit without an AI model. Heading straight to the manual regex path…
tutorial.step.result.title: Result & Score
tutorial.step.result.body: The AI's regex appears here with the matched/expected breakdown, plus a score over Brevity, First-Try, Elegance and Regex Quality.
tutorial.step.result.unavailableBody: This is where the AI's regex + scoring would normally appear. Sign into Copilot later and the next attempt will fill it in.
tutorial.step.regexDirect.title: Or write the regex yourself
tutorial.step.regexDirect.body: If you already know regex, skip the prompt and drop the answer here. The button below only fills the box — you'll press Execute yourself in the next step.
tutorial.step.regexDirect.bodyOnlyPath: Since Copilot is unavailable, this is the path forward. Drop the answer regex here — the button below fills the box, and you'll press Execute yourself in the next step.
tutorial.step.regexDirectExecute.title: Now press Execute
tutorial.step.regexDirectExecute.body: **Press the Execute button to submit the regex.** Clearing this signal finishes the tutorial and unlocks the next level.
tutorial.step.chapters.title: Your Regex Journey Begins
tutorial.step.chapters.body: Nice — first signal cleared! The journey spans 6 chapters, unlocked in order. Each dot is a level — click any unlocked node to jump between them.
tutorial.step.entries.title: Other Entries
tutorial.step.entries.body: The Journey Certificate lives at the very bottom. The SYS_OPS drawer hides dangerous controls like Reset.
tutorial.step.finish.title: You're Ready
tutorial.step.finish.body: You've seen everything you need to start. Safe travels, newcomer.
